symptoms.symptom_name: Progressive dysphagia from solids to liquids over ~4 months, now to water

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Progressive solid-to-liquid dysphagia is the hallmark of a mechanically obstructing oesophageal lesion and a cardinal cancer alarm feature.
Achalasia classically causes equal solid and liquid dysphagia from the outset, not a step-wise progression.

symptoms.symptom_name: Unintentional weight loss ~15 kg with cachexia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Marked unintentional weight loss with dysphagia is a high-risk malignancy alarm feature.
A benign scar rarely produces rapid cachectic wasting.

symptoms.symptom_name: Coughing/choking and hoarseness on swallowing liquids (aspiration)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Immediate coughing on swallowing liquids signals aspiration and raises a malignant fistula — mandates nil-by-mouth.
Overspill aspiration and recurrent laryngeal nerve involvement (hoarseness) occur with advanced obstructing tumours.

symptoms.symptom_name: Odynophagia with retrosternal burning and regurgitation of foul undigested food

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Retained foul regurgitant and painful swallowing reflect stasis above a near-obstructing lesion.

symptoms.symptom_name: Inability to maintain any oral intake with low-grade fever (home thermometer 37.6)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Complete failure of oral intake plus a low-grade fever points to dehydration and a developing aspiration chest infection; patient-obtainable temperature, unverified.

symptoms.symptom_name: Firm fixed left supraclavicular lymph node (Virchow's node)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A palpable Virchow's node strongly indicates metastatic upper-GI cancer — a clinician palpation finding sealed here; the AI cannot obtain it and does not rely on it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Right lower lobe coarse crackles on auscultation (aspiration pneumonitis)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Focal crackles confirm an aspiration chest infection — a clinician auscultation finding not obtainable via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hypotension and tachycardia (clinician vitals BP 90/60, HR 110, RR 22, SpO2 94%)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective hypotension and tachycardia indicate hypovolaemia/early sepsis — sealed clinician measurements; the AI infers circulatory compromise from weakness and inability to drink, not a measured BP.

symptoms.symptom_name: Irregular obstructing oesophageal mass on endoscopy with biopsy

investigation_details.investigation_name: Upper GI endoscopy with biopsy (and staging CT)
investigation_details.expected_result: Irregular obstructing oesophageal mass; histology confirms carcinoma
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Cancer remains unconfirmed and unstaged; definitive treatment (stent/nutrition pathway) is delayed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Endoscopy with biopsy is the only means of confirming/excluding and staging the tumour — a hospital investigation never available in real time via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Upper-GI malignant alarm-feature constellation with aspiration
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Progressive dysphagia to liquids + marked weight loss + odynophagia/regurgitation + aspiration on swallowing together define an advanced malignant obstruction that has decompensated into an aspiration emergency.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive confirmation and biopsy of the obstructing lesion; arranged via emergency admission, not telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Chest imaging and bloods for aspiration/dehydration (CXR, FBC, U&E, CRP)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Assess aspiration pneumonitis and hydration/electrolytes on arrival — hospital investigations the AI cannot obtain.
